Package ci.gouv.dgbf.system.payrollbudget.server.api

Interface AdministrativeUnitPunctualMeasureService.AdministrativeUnitPunctualMeasureSaveRequestDto

All Known Implementing Classes:
AdministrativeUnitPunctualMeasureService.AdministrativeUnitPunctualMeasureCreateRequestDto, AdministrativeUnitPunctualMeasureService.AdministrativeUnitPunctualMeasureUpdateRequestDto
Enclosing interface:
AdministrativeUnitPunctualMeasureService
public static interface AdministrativeUnitPunctualMeasureService.AdministrativeUnitPunctualMeasureSaveRequestDto
Cette interface représente la requête d'enregistrement.
